description_long: This is a pair of high-top canvas sneakers with a classic silhouette, featuring a black upper contrasted by white stitching and white rubber soles. The shoes have white laces arranged in a standard criss-cross pattern, and the side panels display a circular white patch with the text 'CHARLY ROCKS' in black. Along the outer edge of the sole, the phrase 'ALL YOU NEED IS ROCK' is repeatedly printed in white on a black band, adding a distinctive decorative element. The toe caps and midsoles are made of white rubber, providing durability and a clean visual break from the black canvas. The overall design is reminiscent of iconic streetwear sneakers, suitable for casual urban environments.
description: A pair of black high-top canvas sneakers with white laces, white rubber soles, and 'CHARLY ROCKS' branding on the side. The shoes feature a repeated 'ALL YOU NEED IS ROCK' slogan along the sole.
description_view_0: Front view showing both shoes with white criss-cross laces and rounded white rubber toe caps.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the 'CHARLY ROCKS' circular logo and the 'ALL YOU NEED IS ROCK' slogan on the sole.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the solid black heel sections and the slogan wrapping around the back of the soles.
description_view_3: Right side view mirroring the left, with the logo and slogan visible, and the shoe profile clearly outlined.
attribute_logo: Circular white patch on the side with 'CHARLY ROCKS' in black text
